message:
fix(storage): correct snapshot isolation test for WAL mode semantics

The test assumed an open SQLite connection preserves a stale snapshot
after a concurrent writer commits. In WAL mode without an explicit
BEGIN transaction, each statement sees the latest committed state.
After the writer commits, the reader correctly observes the new row.

Updated assertion from 0 to 1 and removed the redundant "reopened
reader" check (same behavior as non-transactional read).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
